insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new ones should not use this hook.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook in new checkout UI extensions and update existing ones to avoid using it. They should look for alternative solutions to achieve the same functionality. The deprecation does not affect existing extensions immediately, but it's essential to plan for the migration to ensure future compatibility.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will not be directly affected by this deprecation, but they may notice changes in the behavior of checkout UI extensions that have not been updated to use alternative solutions.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is crucial because it affects the development of checkout UI extensions, which are essential for customizing the checkout experience. Developers must adapt to the change to ensure their extensions remain compatible with future versions of the API.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, starting with API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more flexibly, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, ensuring that existing workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, including updates to App Update and GCS bundle upload validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The App Store Requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and related Checkout types have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more precise market configurations.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting with API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting with version 2026-07.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS extensions, app pricing, and flow with new features and deadlines

themes.title: POS Extensions
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. This allows for more flexibility in extension development and better handling of discounts.

themes.title: App Development and Pricing
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, and the Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been clarified.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and Customer Account API
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has been updated with changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. The Customer Account API has also been updated, with the removal of the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types in version 2026-10.

actions.text: Update POS extensions to use the new background extension target
Review and update app pricing plans
Verify identity as a Shopify Partner
Update Customer Account API usage to remove deprecated fields
